name: coLssInqVendorId
title: coLssInqVendorId
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by CANopen Basic Functions.
This service causes the determination of the vendor-ID of a LSS slave. It is available in configuration mode only and there may only be one LSS slave in this mode.
errCode Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field)
Example dword errCode[1];coLssInqVendorId( errCode );if (errCode[0] == 0) { write( "LSS inquire Vendor-ID commanded" );}
